items.title: Magyar to become Hungary’s ‘regime change’ PM
items.summary: The former government insider-turned-critic scored a landslide victory last month, pledging wide-ranging reforms to fight corruption
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Israeli settlers set fire to homes and cars in violent West Bank raids
items.summary: Dozens of Israeli settlers stormed various areas of the West Bank, set cars on fire, and attacked Palestinians.

items.title: A Less Muscular Victory Day Parade Shows Putin’s Growing Vulnerability
items.summary: The event, shrunken because of security fears, adds to a sense that Moscow and other cities can no longer be insulated from the war.
